title: Minnesota
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Minnesota

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Minnesota

You can apply for Medicaid in Minnesota by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

Shop Health Insurance Marketplace® in Minnesota

If your small business is located in Minnesota, you can use the MNsure website to learn more about offering your employees health coverage.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Minnesota

If your employer offers SHOP health coverage in Minnesota, you should contact your employer or visit the MNsure website for more information.

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Minnesota

If you live in Minnesota, you’ll use the MNsure website to enroll in health coverage.

CHIP in Minnesota

Minnesota Care covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Minnesota Care right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Minnesota Care.
